findings.evidence: `rg` shows the same proof pattern at lines 56-59 and 77-81: both close the set equality by `ext I` followed by `exact_mod_cast (Iff.rfl : Ideal.absNorm I ≤ N ↔ _)`.
findings.fix: Replace the local `hset` proof with the existing lemma, e.g. `simpa [idealsWithAbsNormNatLe, idealsWithAbsNormRealLe] using (idealsWithAbsNormNatLe_eq_real F N).symm`, so the cast-sensitive reasoning is factored in one place.
findings.issue: `ncard_ideal_absNorm_le_nat` repeats the `ext`/`exact_mod_cast (Iff.rfl ...)` proof of the nat-to-real ideal-bound set equality, even though `idealsWithAbsNormNatLe_eq_real` proves exactly this conversion at lines 56-59.

summary: The proofs are mostly short and readable, but one nat/real set-conversion proof is duplicated instead of using the local lemma already introduced for that conversion.
